Polish Description: BUD. SPALONY W B. MAŁYM % NP. DACH I KILKA LOKALI
English Translation: Building burned in a very small % e.g., roof and a few units

Symbol Description: Black inner rectangle with white border

Polish Description: BUD. CZĘŚCIOWO USZKODZONY /NP. ZAWALONA CZĘŚĆ PIĘTER/
English Translation: Building partially damaged /e.g., part of floors collapsed/
Symbol Description: Rectangle split: left black / right hatched

Polish Description: BUD. SPALONY W DUŻYM %, LECZ NIE CAŁKOWICIE /NP. ZACHOWANE STROPY/
English Translation: Building burned in large %, but not completely /e.g., floor slabs preserved/
Unfinished building /raw state or shell state/

Symbol Description: Thick black outline with empty center
